text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists and is well-documented across multiple academic sources including Semantic Scholar, KAUST Research Portal, ResearchGate, and CiNii, with DOI 10.1109/ICSIPA.2011.6144164. The real title is "Max-pooling convolutional neural networks for vision-based hand gesture recognition" (with a hyphen in "Max-pooling"), and the cited authors match exactly: Nagi, Ducatelle, Di Caro, Ciresan, Meier, Giusti, Nagi, Schmidhuber, and Gambardella. The minor title difference ("Maxpooling" vs. "Max-pooling") is a trivial formatting variation, not a hallucination.
LINK: https://www.semanticscholar.org/paper/Max-pooling-convolutional-neural-networks-for-hand-Nagi-Ducatelle/5418b86c85c662f76f3e69da922f53a03d2ec3c3
